patch.value: Lazy extension activation: defer import+activate until a command needs contributions

Extension overhead is ~73ms on EVERY command in a repo with extensions installed (measured: dev repo list 240ms vs 165ms with --no-extensions; 8 bundled extensions). loader.ts loadExtensions (line ~689) does await import(importHref) for each discovered extension and activateExtensions runs every activate() on every command, even for core commands (list/get) that may need no extension contributions. Investigate deferring the expensive import()+activate() until a command actually requires an extension's command/renderer/parser/hook/service — using cheap manifest capability metadata to decide. Must preserve renderer/hook overrides for core commands. Distinct from pm-3mal (which is module-load/completion/MCP-schema/telemetry-flush, not extension activation). Scales with number of installed extensions.
Commands that use no extension contributions skip extension import()/activate(); renderer/hook overrides still apply where needed; measurable per-command savings with N extensions

value.author: codex-gpt5-20260531
value.text: Evidence: implemented manifest-gated lazy extension activation. Commands with scoped activation metadata skip import()+activate() unless the invocation matches their declared activation.commands; hooks/parser/preflight/renderers stay conservative and still activate globally; legacy broad commands/schema/services manifests without activation metadata preserve old activation behavior. Focused linked test passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts tests/integration/extension-startup.integration.spec.ts tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts (3 files, 59 tests, exit 0; build step included). Timing probe with 8 synthetic command extensions and ~18ms import-side delay: scoped activation list-open samples 504/532/538/401/444ms, median 504ms; legacy broad samples 597/976/658/556/635ms, median 635ms; median delta 131ms. Profile confirmed skip: profile:extensions activation=skipped command=list-open effective=8 warnings=0 discovery_ms=9.

patch.value: Implemented manifest-gated lazy extension activation with focused tests and timing evidence; renderer/hook paths remain conservative and first-party command manifests declare activation.commands.

author: codex-gpt5-20260531

patch.value: Implemented manifest-scoped lazy extension activation with create-template probing and type-aware help preservation.
Core commands that do not need extension contributions skip import/activate while extension-backed commands and help remain correct.
Fresh temp smoke showed list-open activation=skipped with 8 effective bundled extensions; create --template and type-aware help remained functional; release gates passed.
